bls_combo_guidance.eyebrow: Not Sure This Is The Right Class?
bls_combo_guidance.title: Need BLS with another cert for the same renewal cycle?
bls_combo_guidance.body: If you also need ACLS, PALS, or workplace CPR options, compare the related training paths before you book so you do not end up registering for the wrong level of care.

acls_combo_guidance.eyebrow: Not Sure This Is The Right Class?
acls_combo_guidance.title: Need ACLS together with BLS or PALS?
acls_combo_guidance.body: ACLS is usually paired with BLS and sometimes with PALS depending on your role. Use the related hubs first if you are deciding between adult-only, peds-inclusive, or blended renewal needs.

pals_combo_guidance.eyebrow: Not Sure This Is The Right Class?
pals_combo_guidance.title: Need PALS along with ACLS or BLS?
pals_combo_guidance.body: PALS is often booked alongside ACLS or BLS for pediatric and emergency care teams. Compare the companion hubs first if you are trying to line up multiple certifications without duplicating the wrong class.

tabs.label: First Aid + CPR + AED
tabs.description: The broadest Heartsaver option for workplaces and general certification needs, covering first aid, CPR, AED, choking, naloxone awareness, stroke recognition, seizures, asthma, heat illness, burns, and common injury response.
tabs.description_short: First aid, CPR, and AED training for practical workplace and community response.
tabs.description_more: Choose this path when you want hands-on practice plus current first aid topics such as opioid emergencies, FAST stroke recognition, seizure safety, asthma inhaler assistance, heat illness cooling, burns, eye injuries, ticks, stings, poison ivy/oak, and pulse oximetry limitations.
tabs.full_schedule_label: See full Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED schedule

tabs.label: First Aid + CPR + AED
tabs.description: The broadest Heartsaver option for workplaces and general certification needs, covering first aid, CPR, AED, choking, naloxone awareness, stroke recognition, seizures, asthma, heat illness, burns, and common injury response.
tabs.description_short: First aid, CPR, and AED training for practical workplace and community response.
tabs.description_more: Choose this path when you want hands-on practice plus current first aid topics such as opioid emergencies, FAST stroke recognition, seizure safety, asthma inhaler assistance, heat illness cooling, burns, eye injuries, ticks, stings, poison ivy/oak, and pulse oximetry limitations.

tabs.label: CPR + AED Only
tabs.description: Best when you need CPR and AED training without the first aid module, including adult and child choking response and when breaths matter.
tabs.description_short: CPR and AED training without the added first aid component.
tabs.description_more: This option keeps the focus on CPR, AED use, and choking response. It also reinforces that hands-only CPR is not always enough in opioid-related respiratory arrest, where CPR with breaths and naloxone access may matter.
tabs.full_schedule_label: See full Heartsaver CPR AED schedule

tabs.label: CPR + AED Only

tabs.label: ARC BLS

Public dates appear here automatically when matching sessions are available.
name_contains: american red cross basic life support

tabs.label: ARC CPR/AED
tabs.description: Red Cross CPR/AED training for workplace and general certification needs when first aid is not required, including CPR, AED use, and choking response.

Best when first aid is not part of the requested credential but CPR, AED, and choking response are still needed.
Public dates and appointment routing can be added without changing this stable URL.

tabs.label: ARC First Aid/CPR/AED
tabs.description: Red Cross First Aid/CPR/AED for workplaces, schools, and programs that require ARC certification and practical first aid recognition.

Useful when a non-AHA certifying body is required and students need practical topics such as naloxone awareness, FAST stroke recognition, seizures, asthma, burns, heat illness, stings, ticks, and poison plant exposure.
If no public date is listed, scheduling support can route the request.

pages.category_copy: HSI categories stay visible for workplace and group scheduling even when public inventory is temporarily sparse, including CPR/AED, BLS, and first aid response topics.

tabs.label: HSI BLS
tabs.description: HSI Basic Life Support for healthcare providers and students whose requirement accepts HSI.
ecosystem_points: For healthcare-provider level BLS requirements that accept HSI.
Useful for employers, students, and teams that do not need AHA specifically.
Public dates appear automatically when matching HSI BLS sessions are available.

tabs.label: HSI BLS With First Aid
tabs.description: A combined HSI path for students who need BLS plus first aid in the same certification cycle.
ecosystem_points: For workers who need BLS and first aid aligned in the same renewal cycle.
Good fit for industrial, safety, and workplace teams with mixed requirements.
Call/text support can coordinate dates when public inventory is not listed.
name_contains: Basic Life Support (BLS) with Adult First Aid
tabs.full_schedule_label: Call/text 910-395-5193 for HSI BLS with First Aid dates

tabs.label: HSI First Aid/CPR/AED
tabs.description: HSI First Aid/CPR/AED for workplace, school, and professional requirements, including practical recognition of choking, opioid emergencies, stroke, seizures, asthma, heat illness, burns, and common injuries.
ecosystem_points: For OSHA-style workplace first aid, CPR, and AED requirements.
Strong fit for business, industrial, school, and staff training needs that benefit from scenario-based response practice.

Topics can include naloxone access, CPR with breaths for respiratory arrest, FAST stroke recognition, seizure safety, asthma inhaler assistance with spacer preference, heat illness cooling, burns, eye injuries, ticks, stings, poison ivy/oak, and pulse oximetry limitations.
name_contains: HSI Adult First Aid CPR AED

tabs.label: HSI CPR/AED
tabs.description: HSI CPR/AED for students who need CPR, AED, and choking response coverage without a first aid component.
ecosystem_points: For CPR/AED-only requirements where first aid is not needed.
Useful for teams that need a shorter workplace safety credential.
Scheduling support can coordinate public or group options.
